storyHook: 购票进站，车上对话，到站出站

narrative.when: 周末上午，计划当天往返邻近城市
narrative.where: 火车站售票厅 → 车厢座位
narrative.who: 甲（旅客）· 乙（售票员/乘务员）
narrative.how: 带身份证和行李，提前到站
narrative.method: 买票看时刻表、进站上车、途中问站名、到站下车
narrative.event: 甲第一次去外地看望朋友，怕错过发车时间

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good morning. One ticket to the near town, please.
turns.zh: 早。一张去邻市的票。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. The 9:20 train. That gives you forty minutes.
turns.zh: 行。九点二十的车，你还有四十分钟。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Will I make it? I'm a bit on edge.
turns.zh: 来得及吗？我有点紧张。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Time is no trouble. Here is your ticket and your card. Door 3.
turns.zh: 时间没问题。这是你的票和证件。三号门。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Thanks. Which way is the door?
turns.zh: 谢谢。门怎么走？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Go straight past the store. You will see the glass.
turns.zh: 直走，过了商店。能看到屏幕。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Got it. I'll head there now.
turns.zh: 明白了。我现在过去。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Keep your ticket ready. They will look at it at the door.
turns.zh: 票拿好，门口会看。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Will do. Thanks.
turns.zh: 好的。谢了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Have a good journey. Your train is on time.
turns.zh: 旅途愉快。你的车准点。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I'm at the door now. The train is here.
turns.zh: 我到门口了。车来了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, get on and take a seat. I will be on the train too.
turns.zh: 对，上去找个位子。我也在这趟车上。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Oh, you are the worker from the ticket place!
turns.zh: 哦，你是刚才卖票的！

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That's right. I work on the train as well. Let me help with your bag.
turns.zh: 没错，我也在车上服务。包我来帮你放。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is very kind. I was troubled by the time.
turns.zh: 你太好了。我刚才还担心时间。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: No need to be troubled. The train is not late on this line.
turns.zh: 不用操心，这条线从来不晚点。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is good. I will see a friend for the first time.
turns.zh: 那就好。我第一次去看一个朋友。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: A first time is special. Is your friend at the station?
turns.zh: 第一次总是特别的。你朋友在车站接你吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, he will be at the door when I get off.
turns.zh: 对，他会在出站口等我。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is good. You will have a happy time. Look at the fields out there.
turns.zh: 真好，你会玩得很开心的。看外面的田野。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Oh, they are so green. Is that a river?
turns.zh: 哇，好绿啊。那是条河吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, it goes to the town after this. Some go fishing there.
turns.zh: 对，一直流到下一个镇子。有人在那儿钓鱼。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I would like to go fishing some day. But not today.
turns.zh: 以后我也想钓鱼。但不是今天。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Today you see a friend. That is better than fish.
turns.zh: 今天你要见朋友，比钓鱼强。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right! How long till we get there?
turns.zh: 说得对！还有多久到？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: About twenty minutes. Do you have a bag to get down?
turns.zh: 大概二十分钟。你有包要拿下来吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, the blue one up there. I will get it after a short time.
turns.zh: 有的，上面那个蓝色的。我一会儿就拿。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will give you a hand if it is not light.
turns.zh: 要是重的话，我帮你搭把手。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is kind. It is not a great weight, but thanks.
turns.zh: 你真好。不算太重，但谢啦。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: No trouble. So, what will you and your friend do today?
turns.zh: 不麻烦。那你和朋友今天打算干什么？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: He said we would go for a walk by the water and have a meal.
turns.zh: 他说我们会去河边走走，然后吃顿饭。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: The weather is good for that.
turns.zh: 这天气正合适。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, good it is not raining. I was troubled about that.
turns.zh: 是啊，幸好没下雨。我之前还挺担心的。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Rain would be a shame. But look, the sun is out now.
turns.zh: 下雨就可惜了。不过你看，现在出太阳了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Oh yes! I see the high land far off. Are we near?
turns.zh: 哦，是的！我看见远处的高地。快到了吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Not far now. About ten minutes. That high bit is where the town starts.
turns.zh: 不远了，大概十分钟。那片高地就是镇子的起点。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. I will get my bag down then.
turns.zh: 好，那我准备拿下包了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Take your time. The train will stop for a bit.
turns.zh: 慢慢来，车会停一会儿。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. I hope my friend is on time.
turns.zh: 行。希望我朋友准时到。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I have no doubt he will be. This is a happy day for you.
turns.zh: 他肯定会的。今天对你来说是个开心的日子。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will give him a ring when I get off.
turns.zh: 我下车就给他打个电话。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good idea. The net is good here.
turns.zh: 好主意，这儿网络不错。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: What is that building with the high point?
turns.zh: 那个有高尖的建筑是什么？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is the old church. They have a market there on the day before the first day of the week.
turns.zh: 那是老教堂，一周的第一天前一天有集市。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I would like to see that one day.
turns.zh: 哪天我也想去看看。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You will have time. Your friend will take you about.
turns.zh: 你有的是时间，你朋友会带你逛的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I hope so. He said he has a thought for today.
turns.zh: 希望如此，他说今天有想法。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Then you are in good hands. I see the station now.
turns.zh: 那你就交给他了。我看到车站了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, I see it too. Time to get ready.
turns.zh: 嗯，我也看到了。该准备下车了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Have a great time with your friend. sure!
turns.zh: 祝你跟朋友玩得开心，好的！

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Thank you for your help. I am better now.
turns.zh: 谢谢你的帮忙，我现在好多了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: No trouble. Do you have a bag for your things?
turns.zh: 不客气。你有袋子装东西吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, I have a small bag here. It has my book and water.
turns.zh: 有，我有个小包，里面装了书和水。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. The train will stop in ten minutes.
turns.zh: 好的，火车十分钟后到站。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will get my bag down now. Is the door on this side?
turns.zh: 我现在就把包拿下来。门在这边吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, the door on the right. Watch your step.
turns.zh: 对，右边的门。注意脚下。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will. The air outside smells sweet.
turns.zh: 我会的。外面的空气闻起来很香。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is the flowers from the gardens near the station.
turns.zh: 那是车站附近花园里的花香。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: What a good start to the day! I will come again.
turns.zh: 多么美好的一天开始！我还会再来的。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You are welcome any time. Go safe!
turns.zh: 随时欢迎你。一路平安！

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The train is slowing down now.
turns.zh: 火车在减速了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, we are almost there. Five more minutes.
turns.zh: 嗯，快到了，还有五分钟。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I see a tall building with a clock on top.
turns.zh: 我看到一座高楼上有个钟。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is the station clock. You will be on time.
turns.zh: 那是车站的钟，你会准时到的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. My friend said he would be at the door.
turns.zh: 太好了，我朋友说会在门口等我。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: He will be happy to okay. First time here?
turns.zh: 他见到你会很高兴的。第一次来这儿？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, I have only seen pictures of this town.
turns.zh: 嗯，之前只看过这座小镇的照片。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: It is a good place. The old streets are quiet.
turns.zh: 这地方不错，老街很安静。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will get my friend to take me there.
turns.zh: 我会让朋友带我去看看。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good idea. Now get your bag ready.
turns.zh: 好主意。现在把包准备好。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I have my bag here. Is the door near?
turns.zh: 包在这儿。出口近吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, go down the steps and turn left.
turns.zh: 近，下台阶左转就是。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I see the steps now. Thank you for your help.
turns.zh: 看到台阶了。多谢你帮忙。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: My pleasure. Have a good time with your friend.
turns.zh: 不客气。祝你跟朋友玩得开心。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will. The town looks good from the window.
turns.zh: 会的。从窗户看这小镇挺漂亮。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: See the market square. It is full of flowers.
turns.zh: 等你看到集市广场再说，那儿全是花。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Flowers? My friend did not say that.
turns.zh: 花？我朋友没提过。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: He may be keeping it as a surprise.
turns.zh: 他可能想给你个惊喜。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is kind of him. I will go now.
turns.zh: 他真好。我走了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Safe journey. Give my love to the town.
turns.zh: 一路顺风。替我向小镇问好。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will. The streets look clean and quiet.
turns.zh: 会的。街道看起来很干净安静。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is the old part. Not many carts go there.
turns.zh: 那是老城区，车不多。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Is it better to walk or take a car from the station?
turns.zh: 我该走路还是从车站坐车？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Walk. Ten minutes, you will see the stores.
turns.zh: 走路吧，十分钟，还能看看店铺。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good idea. I have only a small bag.
turns.zh: 好主意。我只有一个包。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: There is a book store on the turn. My best one.
turns.zh: 拐角有家书店，我最喜欢的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I like books. I may go in before I see him.
turns.zh: 我喜欢书。也许见面前进去逛逛。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Do that. He will be late, I am certain.
turns.zh: 去吧。他肯定迟到。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Have you seen him before?
turns.zh: 你以前见过他吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: No, but friends are late for a surprise now and then.
turns.zh: 不认识，但朋友为了惊喜有时迟到。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will take a look at the book store.
turns.zh: 我去书店逛逛。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. On the left, past the flower store.
turns.zh: 好。左边，过了花店就是。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Flowers? I did not see them from the train.
turns.zh: 花？我在火车上没看到。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: They are small, but the owner is kind.
turns.zh: 店面小，但老板人很好。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will say you sent me.
turns.zh: 我就说是你介绍我来的。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Do that. He will give you a good price.
turns.zh: 说吧。他会给你个好价钱。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That was a good talk. I am better now.
turns.zh: 刚才聊得很好。我现在好多了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Now go and have your day out.
turns.zh: 好。现在去享受你的一天吧。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will. Thank you for your help.
turns.zh: 我会的。谢谢你的帮助。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: No trouble. Have a good time with your friend.
turns.zh: 不客气。和你朋友玩得开心。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will send you a picture of the flowers.
turns.zh: 我会给你发一张花的照片。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I would like that. Safe journey back.
turns.zh: 那我等着。回程一路平安。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The train back is at six, yes?
turns.zh: 回程火车是六点，对吧？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, from the same door. Do not be late.
turns.zh: 对，同一个站台。别迟到。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will keep an eye on the time.
turns.zh: 我会看好时间的。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good man. Now off you go.
turns.zh: 好样的。现在走吧。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: sure. And thanks again.
turns.zh: 好的。再次感谢。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right then. Off you go. Your friend is waiting.
turns.zh: 好了。走吧。你朋友在等着呢。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I see him! He is waving. Thank you for everything.
turns.zh: 我看到他了！他在挥手。谢谢你的一切。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: My pleasure. Have a great day. Good day!
turns.zh: 我的荣幸。祝你今天愉快。再见！

storyBlurb: 甲第一次独自坐火车去邻市看望朋友，从购票到出站一路忐忑。车厢里与乘务员闲聊风景，到站时终于松一口气。
storyScript:
【开场·购票进站】周末清晨，甲拖着行李箱匆匆走进火车站售票厅。售票窗口前，乙正低头整理票据。甲递上身份证，声音带着紧张：一张去邻市的票，最近一趟。乙熟练地敲击键盘，抬头看了一眼墙上的时钟：九点二十发车，还有四十分钟，来得及。甲接过车票和身份证，手指微微发凉。他转身走向安检口，行李在身后轻轻摇晃。候车大厅的电子屏滚动着车次信息，甲找到对应的检票口，坐在塑料椅上，目光紧盯着检票口的指示灯。广播响起，他站起身，随着人流缓缓移动，心跳随着脚步加快。

【进行·上车就座】列车缓缓进站，甲随着队伍登上车厢。他找到靠窗的座位，将行李箱举上行李架，动作有些笨拙。坐定后，他掏出手机看了一眼时间，又塞回口袋。窗外的站台上，人们匆匆告别或拥抱。汽笛声响起，列车启动，城市的天际线逐渐后退。甲靠在椅背上，手心微微出汗。这时，乘务员乙推着小车经过，微笑着问：需要饮料吗？甲摇摇头，乙却停下脚步，指了指窗外：看，那片湖，夏天时特别好看。甲顺着方向望去，一片碧蓝的水面在阳光下闪烁，心情莫名放松了些。

【进行·途中交谈】列车驶过田野，乙再次经过，见甲望着窗外发呆，便在他旁边的空位坐下。乙问：第一次坐这趟车？甲点头，说去看朋友，怕坐过站。乙笑了：别担心，到站我会提醒你。她指着远处的山峦：那边就是邻市了，山后有个古镇，值得一去。甲听着，目光追随她的手指，仿佛看见了另一个世界。窗外的风景从城市变成乡村，又从乡村变回城市，甲渐渐不再紧张，甚至开始期待见到朋友。乙起身去服务下一节车厢，临走时说：还有二十分钟，收拾一下行李吧。甲点头，心里涌起一阵暖意。

【收束·到站离开】列车减速，广播响起：邻市站到了。甲站起身，从行李架上取下箱子，动作比上车时利落许多。车门打开，他随着人流走下台阶，踏上陌生的站台。阳光正好，空气里飘着不知名的花香。他回头看了一眼列车，乙正站在车门边向乘客微笑。甲深吸一口气，拖着箱子走向出站口。手机震动，朋友发来消息：到了吗？我在出口等你。甲加快脚步，嘴角不自觉上扬。第一次独自旅行的忐忑，在这一刻化为期待和喜悦。
